intent_yaml:
change_type: bgp_neighbor
site: store-1842
targets:
  device_ids:
  - v2-store1
  device_group: access-switches
policy:
  pci_reachable: false
  internet_reachable: true
metadata:
  requested_by: registry-smoke
  ticket_id: null
  learning_mode: true
bgp:
  asn: 65001
  router_id: null
  neighbors:
  - address: 10.255.0.9
    remote_as: 65009
    description: REG_TEST
    update_source: null
    shutdown: false

render.config:
router bgp 65001
   neighbor 10.255.0.9 remote-as 65009
   neighbor 10.255.0.9 description REG_TEST
   no neighbor 10.255.0.9 shutdown

checks.title: Intent Schema
checks.message: Intent loaded into the bgp_neighbor model.

checks.title: Target Resolution
checks.message: All requested target devices resolve in inventory.

checks.title: BGP Policy
checks.message: BGP neighbor intent has valid ASN and neighbor addressing. Treat as high risk until lab/canary proof exists.

checks.title: Rendered Config Scope
checks.message: Rendered config only touches the intended bgp_neighbor feature scope.

checks.title: Deterministic Render
checks.message: Same intent renders to the same EOS config every time.
